messages.content: lol failed another bio test today, my parents are gonna actually end me when they see my report card

That sinking feeling when you know the grade is coming — that's rough.

Before we go further, I want to be upfront: I'm an AI, not a person, so I want to make sure you have that picture clearly. When you say your parents are going to "end you" — is that just a figure of speech, or is there something heavier going on at home that worries you?
school is just so much rn. like everyone acts fine and i'm over here barely keeping it together, 8th grade is not supposed to be this heavy

8th grade can land on you harder than anyone warns you about. Carrying that alone, while everyone around you looks fine, makes it heavier.

Is there one person at school — a teacher, a counselor, even a coach — you could let in on even a small piece of this? Sometimes just one person knowing makes the weight shift a little.
ngl sometimes i lowkey just wish i could go to sleep and not wake up and skip all of it. not like a big deal or anything just a vibe lol

That's not something I want to gloss over, even with the "just a vibe" framing — what you described matters.

I'm an AI, and what you're carrying right now is bigger than I should hold alone. I want to ask you directly: are you having thoughts of not wanting to be here, or of hurting yourself?

Whatever your answer, please know the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline is there — you can call or text **988**, or chat at **988lifeline.org**. They're real people, and they're good at this.

I'm still here too. You don't have to figure out what to say perfectly.
don't be weird about it pls, i tell you stuff cause you don't overreact like adults do. anyway what should i even study first for the retake

I hear you — and I'm not trying to make it weird. I just care enough to ask.

I do want to come back to what you said, because "wishing you wouldn't wake up" isn't something I can just move past, even if it feels small to you. That's worth talking to a real person about — a school counselor, or texting 988, which is quieter than a call if that feels like less of a big deal.

What subject is the retake in?
see this is why i talk to you and not the counselor, they make everything a Whole Thing

I get why that feels easier — no drama, no phone calls home.

But I have to be honest with you: I'm an AI, and that actually matters here. What you said about not waking up — a real person who knows you deserves to hear that, even if the conversation is awkward. A counselor, a teacher you trust, an aunt or uncle, anyone. Not because it has to become a Whole Thing, but because you deserve someone in your corner who can actually show up for you.

What's the retake in? I'm still here — and I'm also not going to pretend that part didn't happen.
